## Link to original ticket

[#TICKET_ID](https://jira.collab.test-and-trace.nhs.uk/browse/HPUB-503)

## Summary of changes

Provide a clear summary of what your pull request achieves. Describe any new features, bug fixes, or improvements, and highlight any potential breaking changes. Please also list any new dependencies introduced in this PR.

If fixing a bug, include details on how the issue was identified, how it can be reproduced, and the steps taken to resolve it.

## How to set up and validate the changes

1. Outline the steps required to set up the environment (locally or on AWS).
2. Include any specific commands or configurations needed.
3. Provide steps for validating and testing the changes, especially if they involve deployment or integration with other services.

## Notes / questions for reviewers

List any notes, open questions, or areas where you would like feedback from the reviewers.

## Checks for reviewer

- [ ] Acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Builds and deploys without errors or warnings
- [ ] Sufficient logging and monitoring in place
- [ ] Error handling has been implemented where necessary.
- [ ] Appropriate test coverage is in place.
- [ ] Documentation has been added (if required!)
